categoryDescription.developer: Generators, converters, and everyday dev utilities.
categoryDescription.pdf: Merge, split, and edit PDF documents.
categoryDescription.security: QR codes, OTP, and certificate tools.

base64.title: Base64 Encode / Decode
base64.description: Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 back to text.

url.title: URL Encode / Decode
url.description: Percent-encode text for URLs or decode it back.

html.title: HTML Encode / Decode
html.description: Escape text into HTML entities or decode entities back to text.

jwt.title: JWT Decoder
jwt.description: Decode a JSON Web Token's header and payload. Does not verify the signature.
jwt.noVerify: The signature is not verified — this tool only decodes the token.
jwt.invalid: Input is not a valid JWT.

json.title: JSON Formatter
json.description: Beautify or minify JSON, with validation.

json-yaml.title: JSON ↔ YAML
json-yaml.description: Convert between JSON and YAML in either direction.

markdown.title: Markdown Preview
markdown.description: Write Markdown and see it rendered live (sanitized).

diff.title: Diff Viewer
diff.description: Compare two texts line by line.
diff.empty: Enter text in both panes to see the differences.

lorem.title: Lorem Ipsum Generator
lorem.description: Generate placeholder paragraphs, sentences, or words.

uuid.title: UUID Generator
uuid.description: Generate RFC-4122 UUIDs (v1, v4, v6, v7, or nil).

password.title: Password Generator
password.description: Generate strong random passwords in your browser.
password.noSet: Select at least one character set.

hash.title: Hash Generator
hash.description: Compute MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, and SHA-512 digests.
hash.inputPlaceholder: Type or paste text to hash…

hmac.title: HMAC Generator
hmac.description: Compute a keyed hash (HMAC) of a message.

timestamp.title: Timestamp Converter
timestamp.description: Convert between Unix timestamps and human-readable dates.
timestamp.inputPlaceholder: Unix timestamp or a date string…
timestamp.invalid: Could not parse that as a timestamp or date.

cron.title: Cron Parser
cron.description: Explain a cron expression and preview its next runs.

regex.title: Regex Tester
regex.description: Test a regular expression against sample text.

sql.title: SQL Formatter
sql.description: Format and beautify SQL for many dialects.

color.title: Color Converter
color.description: Convert colors between HEX, RGB, HSL, HSV, HWB, CMYK, LAB, LCH, and XYZ.

image-convert.title: Image Converter
image-convert.description: Convert between PNG, JPEG, WebP, and AVIF.

image-editor.title: Image Editor
image-editor.description: Crop, rotate, flip, and resize an image in one workspace.

image-compress.title: Compress Image
image-compress.description: Reduce image file size with lossy compression.

image-exif.title: Remove EXIF
image-exif.description: Strip metadata (EXIF, GPS, color profile) by re-encoding.
image-exif.done: Metadata removed — the downloaded image carries no EXIF or GPS data.

image-metadata.title: Image Metadata Viewer
image-metadata.description: Inspect an image's EXIF and basic metadata.
image-metadata.name: Name
image-metadata.noExif: No EXIF metadata found in this image.

zip.title: Create ZIP
zip.description: Bundle files into a ZIP archive — entirely in your browser.
zip.prompt: Drop files to add to the archive, or click to browse

unzip.title: Unzip
unzip.description: Extract the contents of a ZIP archive.
unzip.prompt: Drop a .zip file here, or click to browse
unzip.invalid: Could not read that ZIP archive.

tar.title: TAR Extract
tar.description: Extract files from a .tar or .tar.gz archive.
tar.prompt: Drop a .tar / .tar.gz file here, or click to browse
tar.invalid: Could not read that TAR archive.

checksum.title: File Checksum
checksum.description: Compute MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, and SHA-512 of a file.
checksum.prompt: Drop a file here, or click to browse
checksum.verifyPlaceholder: Paste an expected hash to compare…

file-compare.title: Compare Files
file-compare.description: Check whether two files are byte-for-byte identical.

pdf-editor.title: PDF Editor
pdf-editor.description: Merge, reorder, rotate, and delete pages with live previews — all in one workspace.
pdf-editor.prompt: Drop PDF files here, or click to browse
pdf-editor.dragHint: Click a page to preview it. Drag to reorder. Hover a page to rotate or remove it.
pdf-editor.previewEmpty: Select a page to preview it

pdf-compress.title: Compress PDF
pdf-compress.description: Reduce PDF size by optimizing its structure.
pdf-compress.prompt: Drop a PDF here, or click to browse
pdf-compress.note: Structural optimization only — embedded images aren't re-encoded, so savings are usually modest.

qr-generate.title: QR Code Generator
qr-generate.description: Generate a QR code from any text or URL.
qr-generate.empty: Enter content to generate a QR code

qr-read.title: QR Code Reader
qr-read.description: Decode a QR code from an image.
qr-read.prompt: Drop an image with a QR code, or click to browse
qr-read.notFound: No QR code found in this image.

otp.title: OTP URI Parser
otp.description: Parse an otpauth:// URI (authenticator setup link) into its fields.

certificate.title: Certificate Viewer
certificate.description: Inspect an X.509 certificate (PEM). The signature is not verified.
certificate.prompt: Drop a .pem / .crt file, or click to browse
certificate.subject: Subject

video-editor.title: Video Editor
video-editor.description: A timeline editor: trim with in/out points, scrub a filmstrip and waveform, and capture frames.
video-editor.prompt: Drop a video here, or click to browse
video-editor.note: Trim is stream-copied (no re-encode), so cuts snap to the nearest keyframe. Frames are captured losslessly as PNG.

video-convert.title: Video Converter
video-convert.description: Convert video to MP4, WebM, MKV, MOV, GIF, or extract the audio.
video-convert.prompt: Drop a video or GIF here, or click to browse
video-convert.note: Runs locally and re-encodes — larger videos can take a while. Some outputs depend on codecs in the bundled core.

video-frame.title: Extract Frame
video-frame.description: Scrub a video and capture the current frame as a PNG.
video-frame.prompt: Drop a video here, or click to browse

video-trim.title: Trim Video
video-trim.description: Drag the handles to select a range, then trim (no re-encode).
video-trim.prompt: Drop a video here, or click to browse
video-trim.note: Stream-copied, so cuts snap to the nearest keyframe.

audio-convert.title: Audio Converter
audio-convert.description: Convert audio between MP3, WAV, FLAC, OGG, Opus, and AAC.
audio-convert.prompt: Drop an audio file here, or click to browse
audio-convert.note: Runs locally. Some formats depend on codecs in the bundled core.
